The issue, identified by error code PAY-4521, is currently affecting approximately 15% of transactions, resulting in failed payments.

Our initial analysis suggests that the bug is causing inconsistent processing of payment information, leading to transaction failures. To mitigate the impact on our operations and minimize disruption to our customers, we have implemented a temporary workaround involving manual verification of affected transactions. However, this is not a sustainable long-term solution and requires prompt resolution.

I urge you to treat this matter with the utmost urgency and allocate necessary resources to investigate and rectify the issue as soon as possible. A thorough analysis of the payment processing module is essential to identify the root cause of the bug and implement a permanent fix.

Please provide an estimated timeline for the resolution of this issue and keep me informed of any progress. If you require any additional information or support, please do not hesitate to reach out.
